content.title: Dropship, to anything and anyone!
content.description:
Dropship for Everyone!

[Main feature]
■ Platform Independent
It can be easily transmitted not only on Android but also on iOS and the web

■ Create your own shared link
You can create a sharing link with your own unique keywords

■ Set various options
You can set how long and how many shares I want to share

content.shortDescription: Helps you automate repetitive tasks depending on the situation.

Use the screenshot and screen recording features more conveniently. After screen capture, you can delete the screenshot immediately without saving, and while recording a screen, you are free from any interruptions such as notifications, messages, or sounds.
content.title: More powerful screenshot and screen recording.
content.description:
- Delete button provided on screenshot toolbar
- No copying of the captured image to the Clipboard
- Provides various selfie video options
- Enable Do Not Disturb during screen recording

content.title: New notification management service.
content.description:
- Select apps to save notifications
- Create a page where you can check notifications that contain the chosen keywords
- Search notifications you need by keyword
- Quickly check the notifications history through the shortcut icon on the lock screen
- Change the locations and colors of the lock screen shortcut icons
- Configure period of storing notifications

content.shortDescription: Adjust settings for touch on edge screen easily.
content.title: Adjust settings for touch on edge screen.
content.description:
- Prevents accidental edge touch
- Easy management of edge zone
- Provides a grip zone that does not recognize long press
- Separate management of landscape mode for edge zones

content.shortDescription: Look into the causes of unexplained actions such as vibrations or the screen turning on.
content.title: Check the causes of unexplained actions on your device.
content.description:
- Available items
: Vibration, Ringer mode, Call mode, Toast popup, Ads screens, Screen on, Settings changes, Media volume mute

content.shortDescription: Use your phone or tablet easily with just your thumb. A small handler has been added to the left and right edges of the screen so that the device can be used with one hand, and you can configure frequently used functions to correspond to certain gestures and activate them immediately.
content.title: Use your device easily with just your thumb!
content.description:
- Configure functions for gestures in the horizontal/diagonally up/diagonally down directions
- Activate frequently used functions such as Back, Home screen, and Recent apps directly with gestures
- Change gesture handle locations and add handles

content.shortDescription: Various features have been added to Bixby Routines, allowing you to create more powerful Routines. Try the extra features of Routine+ in Modes and Routines.
content.title: Create more useful Routines.
content.description:
- Added conditions
 : Unlock with fingerprints, S Pen action, side and navigation button action
- Added movements
 : Text Reader, direction keys. Touch macro
- Easily use features added through suggested Routines
- Easily share with QR codes and import saved Routines

content.shortDescription: Experience the improved Multi window. In particular, this provides more enjoyable features to better enjoy on the large screen.
content.title: Experience the upgraded Multi window features.
content.description:
<Common>
- Use multiple apps without pause in Multi window
- Show more content by resizing to fit to screen when running Multi window
- Avoid minimizing the pop-up view when activity changes between apps
- Remove the blur effect in split screen view (One UI 4 or higher)

<For Galaxy Flip>
- Quick launch of game apps or some media apps on the cover screen (One UI 4 or higher)

<I ♡ Foldable: For Galaxy Fold>
- Cover the hole with black on UDC
- Configure app settings to fit full screen size when folded

<I ♡ DeX >
- Supports high resolution regardless of connected accessories
- Use more apps at the same time
- Automatic relaunch of recently used apps when starting and ending DeX mode

content.shortDescription: Feel free to share your own Galaxy settings!
content.title: Share my galaxy!
content.description:
Get settings shared through Galaxy To Share, and feel free to share your own settings you want to share!

■ List of compatible apps :
  KeysCafe, Theme Park, Lockstar, Sound Assistant, HomeUp,
  Multistar, ClockFace, Quickstar, Navstar, One Hand Operation +
  Other device settings(Wallpaper, Theme, AOD, Launcher, Settings)

■ Select and apply the settings you want in the Recommended tab.
■ You can manage and share the settings you have created.
■ Share the settings made with 'Galaxy To Share' through the Dropship app.

content.shortDescription: Customize your own camera settings to your preference
content.title: It provides ON/OFF features for the following features:
content.description:
- Auto HDR
  : Capture more details in the bright and dark areas of your pictures and videos.
- Soften pictures  
  : Smooth out sharp edges and textures in Photo mode pictures.
- Auto lens switching
  : Let the camera pick the best lens based on the zoom, lighting, and distance to the subject.
- Video recording in Photo mode
  : Touch and hold the Shutter button to record videos in Photo mode.
- Faster shutter
  : Speed up the shutter by capturing fewer frames. This may decrease picture quality.
- Clean preview on HDMI displays
  : Show the camera preview without settings or buttons on HDMI-connected displays.

The following features are also available.     
- Number of pictures after timer
- Camera timeout

content.shortDescription: Conveniently configure the Settings app and quickly launch useful features.
content.title: Conveniently configure the Settings home
content.description:
- Re-configure menu of Settings home screen
 : Change order, hide,manage groups
- Set method of displaying Samsung account on the Settings home screen
- Search settings change history, change notification settings
- Activate features by tapping the back of the device (Galaxy S/ Flip only)
- Run features by long-pressing the side key
- Run features by pressing the screen strongly (Fold 4 only)

content.shortDescription: Expand audio system settings and increase convenience.
content.title: Experience the improved audio related features.
content.description:
- Various volume controls by app
- 150 levels of detailed volume control
- Supports simultaneous sound playback for apps 
- Customize the layout with your own volume panel
- Add color to the volume panel
- Control playback or media volume through the volume buttons
- Quick access to media apps with the media app favorites settings
- Sync sound while playing video after BT connection
- Create vibration patterns for ringtones or notifications
- Save and share your own EQ settings

content.shortDescription: Customize your display settings to your preference.
content.title: Improve your display experience
content.description:
- Manage screen timeout for each app
- Keep screen turned on option
- Adjust refresh rate per app
- Set brightness limit profiles

content.shortDescription: Enjoy a more pleasant gaming experience with Galaxy!
content.title: Enjoy a better gaming experience!
content.description:
- Gamepad key remapping
- GPU settings (rotation optimization / texture quality)
- Change game category of apps

content.shortDescription: Gallery Assistant is a utility app that offers comprehensive editing features for images and videos.
content.title: Comprehensive editing features for images and videos.
content.description:
- Batch Editing: Apply the same edits to multiple photos and videos.
- Size Compression: Shrink the file size of photos and videos.
- Watermarking: Add custom or repeating watermarks.
